response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct hands-on work in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), database experience (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), Docker/Kubernetes exposure, and a demonstrated commitment to testing/TDD make this a strong fit.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Current hands-on work with AI agents and MCP code generators directly matches a key requirement
Strong testing/TDD culture (Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the resume
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth — AWS CDK noted but no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes-at-scale detail
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears older (Altom, robotic arms era)
